title: Jinja2 Constants
content:
This file defines constants used within the Jinja2 library, primarily for the `lipsum()` helper function.

### Key Exports

*   `LOREM_IPSUM_WORDS`: A string containing a long list of lorem ipsum words, used to generate placeholder text.
